steps.title: Understand the condition for no solution
steps.content: A system of linear equations has no solution when the lines are parallel — they have the same slope but different y-intercepts.

steps.title: Find the slope that makes the lines parallel
steps.content:
The first equation $y = 2x + 1$ has slope 2.

For the second equation $y = ax - 8$ to be parallel, it must have the same slope.

Therefore, $a = 2$. The y-intercepts are different ($1$ versus $-8$), confirming the lines are parallel with no intersection point.

That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
